package.name: odometry_filter
package.description: Hand-rolled 9-state EKF for body-frame odometry on the IFS-08 DV pipeline. State = [x, y, θ, vx, vy, ω, ba_x, ba_y, bg_z]. Predict step is Coriolis-correct (v̇x = ax + ω·vy, v̇y = ay − ω·vx) — fixes the cornering vy drift that was the trackdrive ceiling pre-rewrite. Measurements: motor-RPM → vx; steering-angle kinematic-bicycle → ω (gated under slip). No ROS dependency in the library itself — the lifecycle wrapper lives in odometry_filter_node. The same library is intended to compile against the real-car uDV firmware.
